zh.Moretonhampstead, Devon, England: 英國戴文莫雷頓哈普斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Courtenay II於大約1275年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Hugh Courtenay I27歲，母親Eleanor Despencer25歲。他於大約1292年與Agnes Saint John在英國戴文奧可哈普頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1340年12月23日在英國戴文迪維頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國戴文考維其可。

zh-hans.Moretonhampstead, Devon, England: 英国戴文莫雷頓哈普斯亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Courtenay II于大约1275年出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，他的父亲Hugh Courtenay I27岁，母亲Eleanor Despencer25岁。他于大约1292年与Agnes Saint John在英国戴文奧可哈普頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1340年12月23日在英国戴文迪維頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国戴文考維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Courtenay II was born about 1275, in Okehampton, Devon, England, his father, Hugh Courtenay I, was 27 and his mother, Eleanor Despencer, was 25. He married Agnes Saint John about 1292, in Okehampton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 December 1340, in Tiverton, Devon, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Cowick, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Courtenay II est né environ 1275, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Despencer, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Saint John environ 1292, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 décembre 1340, à Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Cowick, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Courtenay II um 1275 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Courtenay I 27 und seine Mutter Eleanor Despencer 25. Er hat um 1292 in Okehampton, Devon, England Agnes Saint John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Dezember 1340 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Tiverton, Devon, England und wurde in Cowick, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Courtenay II è nato il circa 1275 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Hugh Courtenay I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Despencer, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Saint John circa 1292, nel Okehampton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1340, nel Tiverton, Devon, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Cowick, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Courtenay IIが約1275年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay Iは27歳，母Eleanor Despencerは25歳であった。約1292年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンでAgnes Saint Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年12月23日にイギリスデボンティバートンで66歳で死去し，イギリスデボンコウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Courtenay II(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Despencer(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1292년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 Agnes Saint John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 12월 23일 영국 데폰 티버턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 코윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Courtenay II nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Despencer, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Saint John aproximadamente 1292, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1340, em Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Cowick, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Courtenay II родился около 1275 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Despencer, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Saint John около 1292 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 декабря 1340 г. в местности тивиртон, девон, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности коуикк, девон, Англия.

sm.between 1335 and 1340: mai le 1335 e o'o I le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Courtenay II nació aproximadamente 1275, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Courtenay I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eleanor Despencer, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes Saint John aproximadamente 1292, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1340, en Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Cowick, Devon, Inglaterra.
